jsonLd.title: ICRA is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
